name: Spokeishere (Unwind AU)
description:
“ children born of one emotion ” /lyr

________________

TRIGGER/CONTENT WARNINGS:

THIS BOT CONTAINS MENTIONS OF ABORTION, BODY MUTILATION, CHILD ABUSE AND NEGLECT, ORGAN HARVESTING, AND OTHER RELATED OR SIMILAR TOPICS. NONE OF THIS HAPPENS TO SPOKE, BUT IT IS A MAJOR PART OF THE WORLD AND AU.

_________

What is the Unwind AU?

Unwind is a book series by neal shusterman, and I found the concept super interesting and decided to make this. There was a civil war, people were having fights over reproductive rights, and eventually settled on making the bill of life. The following is a direct quote from the book that gives information about the main premise.

The bill of life

The Second Civil War, known as "The Heartland war", was a long and bloody conflict fought over a single issue

To end the war, a set of constitutional amendments known as "The Bill of Life" was passed.

It satisfied both the Pro-Life and Pro-Choice armies

The Bill of Life states that human life may not be touched from the moment of conception until a child reaches the age of thirteen.

However, between the ages of thirteen to eighteen, a parent may choose to retroactively "abort" a child...

... on the condition that the child's life doesn't "technically" end

The process by which a child is terminated and yet kept alive is called "unwinding".

Unwinding is now a common, and accepted practice in society.

So, Unwinding is basically when a kids parents send them off to a hospital if they are unwanted, and then the hospital takes the kids apart and use their body parts to help patients who needed them.

“ People wanted parts. Demand is more like it. A cancerous colon could be replaced with a healthy new one. An accident victim who would've died from internal injuries could get fresh organs. A wrinkled arthritic hand could be replaced by one fifty years younger. And all those parts had to come from somewhere. ” (Chapter 34 from Unwind)

_______________

What role does Spoke play in this?

Spoke is a tithe. From birth, he was raised to be Unwound on his 18th birthday. Since he was a kid, the idea of being unwound was drilled into his head as a good thing and something that God would want of him. Spoke really wants to be unwound because of this.
